project_name: Kejohanan Sukan Kementerian, Jabatan & Agensi KPKM 2026 (SMK26)

theme.archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism & Precision)
theme.rationale: High-energy command-center feel suitable for a dynamic sports event. Balances government professionalism via strict grids with sporty kinetic energy via high-contrast neon accents.

surfaces.cards: Flat solid backgrounds (#12141A) with 1px solid border (#2D3342), no soft shadows. Use sharp 4px or 8px border-radius (rounded-md/rounded-lg max).
surfaces.glass: Crystal Glass pattern for sticky headers/bottom nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-b/border-t border-[#2D3342].

layout_rules.mobile_first: Crucial. All layouts must prioritize touch targets (min 48x48px) and readable text on small screens. Use generous padding (p-4 to p-6).
layout_rules.grid_system: Bento 'Control Room' grid for dashboards and sports cards. Strict hierarchy. Use gap-4 or gap-6. Make elements fill their grid cells (h-full).
layout_rules.spacing: Generous spacing. Use pb-24 on main content to avoid overlap with bottom navigation bar.

navigation.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50. 5 icons (Home, Sports, Scoreboard, Shop, More). Active state uses text-primary and subtle top border highlight.
navigation.top_header: Sticky top-0 z-40. Contains logo and floating WhatsApp CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,212,170,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-secondary_hover transition-colors
buttons.floating_action: WhatsApp floating button uses solid secondary color (#F97316) for urgency/contact.

badges.UNPAID: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded
badges.PENDING: bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-500 border border-orange-500/20 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded
badges.PAID: bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded

components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for sharp, high-legibility athletic/technical icons.
components.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., data-testid='bottom-nav-home', data-testid='submit-registration-btn').

module_specific_guidelines.home: Parallax scrolling hero overlaying cinematic dark background. Heavy use of primary green and secondary orange for CTAs.
module_specific_guidelines.sports_listing: 15 cards in a compact bento grid. Each card displays sport icon, title, and 'Daftar'/'Jadual' quick links.
module_specific_guidelines.schedule: Vertical timeline view. High contrast, using green/orange dots to indicate active/upcoming events.
module_specific_guidelines.treasure_hunt: Gamified aesthetic. Map-like background. Big, bold, glowing typography for checkpoints and leaderboard.
module_specific_guidelines.eshop: Product focus. Dark background makes the metallic medals pop. Bold 'Beli Sekarang' buttons.
module_specific_guidelines.admin_dashboard: Data-dense. 1px borders, compact Shadcn tables. Neutral gray text with green/orange status highlights.

hero_background.description: Cinematic dark background with aggressive energetic neon green and electric orange geometric light trails.

treasure_hunt_map.description: Abstract 3D topographical map with glowing orange and green routing lines over matte black surface.

eshop_medal_preview.description: Premium sports finisher medal with neon green and orange glowing accents.

sports_generic_1.description: Group of athletes running on outdoor track in evening.

podium_results.description: Three medals on podium blocks symbolizing winner awards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Dark Mode only' theme overriding standard light styles. Ensure HTML/Body has bg-[#0A0A0A] and text-white.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing/home layouts to allow aggressive asymmetry, but use Shadcn for Admin Dashboard, forms, and tables.
Ensure the bottom navigation has z-index 50 and padding is applied to the main layout bottom to prevent content masking.
Never use placeholders for images. Use the precise URLs provided in the media_urls block.
Remember to include data-testid on all interactive elements as explicitly defined in testing rules.
Ensure 'Bahasa Malaysia sahaja' instruction is followed across all text.
